scripts.test:smoke:auth: npm run test:login && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:users && npm run test:settings
scripts.test:smoke:content: npm run test:pages-list && npm run test:page-create && npm run test:editor-drag && npm run test:editor-save-publish && npm run test:media && npm run test:rich-text-lists && npm run test:status-badge
scripts.test:smoke:blog: npm run test:blog-create && npm run test:blog-editor && npm run test:blog-list
scripts.test:smoke:commerce: npm run test:commerce && npm run test:orders
scripts.test:smoke:data: npm run test:collections && npm run test:reusable-sections && npm run test:forms && npm run test:contacts && npm run test:comments
scripts.test:smoke:site: npm run test:sites && npm run test:site-detail && npm run test:frontend-design
scripts.test:smoke:admin: npm run test:smoke:auth && npm run test:smoke:content && npm run test:smoke:blog && npm run test:smoke:commerce && npm run test:smoke:data && npm run test:smoke:site
scripts.test:smoke:public: npm run test:ai-contract-examples --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:preview-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-auth --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-quota --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-safety --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-scope --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:page-renderer --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:public-security --workspace @backy/public
scripts.test:smoke:all: npm run test:smoke:admin && npm run test:smoke:public
scripts.test:editor-grouping: npm run test:editor-multiselect && npm run test:editor-nested-group
